programme.title: MeatEater - Deer the Hard Way: Prince of Wales Island (Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen)
programme.desc: Steven Rinella has hunted this area before, but he feels he's just scratched the surface exploring the surrounding country. The top of the mountain is always calling Steve's name, and for this serious Alaskan backpack hunt he's bringing along comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen. Cold, wet weather and tough hunting for wily Sitka deer make this a southeast Alaskan adventure these hunters will never forget.

programme.title: MeatEater - Burger Extravaganza Cooking Special
programme.desc: As the prime cuts are often the first to go, most families are left with a freezer brimming with ground wild game meat. Pulled from the pages of his forthcoming Wild Game Cookbook, Steve shares a variety of recipes from burger to meatloaf and more ‚Äì designed to whittle down this supply and jazz up your ground meat game.

programme.title: MeatEater - Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 1
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America. In this three-part series, he travels deep into the Amazon jungle to hunt with and learn from the locals there. Not only will this be one heck of a hunting adventure, it will be a mind-opening, life-changing event. From bowfishing to hunting in the jungle at night, you never know what the evening's menu will bring.

programme.title: MeatEater - Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 2
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America.

programme.title: MeatEater - Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 3
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America.

programme.title: MeatEater - About Time: Helen and Brittany Hunt Elk in Montana
programme.desc: Brittany and Helen have put more work in on MeatEater than just about anyone else, but have yet to hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sky Island Solitaire: Backpack Hunting Coues Deer in Arizona
programme.desc: Steve returns to southern Arizona to stalk the elusive Coues deer. Unaccompanied, Steve immerses himself in the quiet southwest desert and gets intimate with one of the most wary animals in the west. Throughout the hunt, Steve articulates why solo time in trophy country is good for the soul.

programme.title: MeatEater - Ribeye of the Sky: Sandhill Cranes in West Texas
programme.desc: Steve and bird hunting aficionado Ronny Boehme join up with wildlife biologist Ed Arnett in Lubbock, Texas.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Coldest Hunt: Nunivak Island Muskox
programme.desc: Lightning strikes twice: Steven Rinella has somehow beaten the odds and drawn a second Muskox tag after having to forfeit his first one four years ago due to unforeseen circumstances. Steve has always regretted passing up an opportunity to hunt Muskox but with another tag in his pocket, nothing will stop this adventure. We learn about the native history and culture of Nunivak Island's as Steve tries to stay warm while chasing Muskox 30 miles offshore in the Bering Sea.

programme.title: MeatEater - Gobbling: California Turkeys
programme.desc: The last time Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen went out with Steven Rinella they were soaked head to toe and came home meatless. To remedy their meat crisis while keeping them dry, Steve sets up a springtime wild turkey hunt in sunny California. Steve gives Joe and Bryan the A to Z on hunting, butchering, and cooking the wild turkey. Steve caps off the introductory lesson by preparing his favorite turkey recipe: Schnitzel.

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 1
programme.desc: In the first part of this series, Steve attempts a unique spring hunt for sooty grouse in the coastal rainforests of southeast Alaska. These mysterious hooters make for a hunt that is markedly different from any other and success doesn't come easily. They say blind squirrels can find a nut, but will Steve harvest a grouse?

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 2
programme.desc: In Part One, Steve experienced the difficulty of hunting the Sooty grouse of southeast Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater - Wild to Table: Memorable Meals Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steve loves to fish as much as he loves to hunt.Steve is on a river in SW Montana for a day to catch.

programme.title: MeatEater - Up at the Cabin: Prince of Wales Island Black Bear
programme.desc: Last spring, Steve decided to pass up an opportunity to kill a black bear in favor of an extended up close and personal experience. This time, Steve heads back to his shack on Prince of Wales Island and he's brought his friend Paul Neess from Vortex Optics along to share the experience of using a canoe to slip in close to these giant black bears.

programme.title: MeatEater - Southern Traditions: Virginia Doves
programme.desc: All across America hunters kick off the fall hunting season with a weekend of doves, friends, and food. Steve's lifelong friend, Ronny Boehme has invited Steve out to his digs in Virginia for the dove opener. To prep for opening day, Steve and Ron spend a day brushing up on their shooting skills on a sporting clays course followed by a pigeon hunt. Steve shares simple, delicious cooking methods for doves and pigeons.

programme.title: MeatEater - Mountain Meditation: BC Grizzly Bear
programme.desc: Ryan Callaghan and Aaron Evans join Steve on an epic adventure in British Columbia's Rockies to pursue grizzly bears. Steve has long desired to take a grizzly but only if he can do it in a way that fits his personal ethics. The hunt is dampened by frustrating weather but Steve finds a way to fix a tasty meal.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lobster of the Prairie: Wyoming Antelope
programme.desc: Steve is fed up with disrespect for one of the world's most unique game animals-the pronghorn antelope.

programme.title: MeatEater - Land of the Giants: Idaho Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Steve's quest for a giant mule deer buck continues in central Idaho.

programme.title: MeatEater - Land of the Giants: Idaho Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Steve's quest for a giant mule deer buck continues in central Idaho. To help Steve in his journey, Ryan Callaghan has offered up one of his best spots as well as his keen spotting skills. The duo backpack hunt in some of the West's steepest and prettiest mountains seeking the colossal buck of Steve's dreams. In part two Steve finds the buck he's been searching for his whole life. The dream is realized and Steve and Ryan feast on a slow cooked roast.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Butchering a Whole Deer
programme.desc: In this Cooking Special, Steve demonstrates how to butcher a whole whitetail deer.

programme.title: Master Plan
programme.desc: In the second season finale, although everyone is still reeling from a shocking death on the lacrosse field, Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends rush to figure out Gerard's (Michael Hogan) master plan…but Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) has his own plan.

programme.title: Tattoo
programme.desc: In the exciting Season 3 premiere, a new Alpha Pack arrives to wreak havoc on Scott's (Tyler Posey) life, while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) and Isaac (Daniel Sharman) struggle to locate Erica (Gage Golightly) and Boyd (Sinqua Walls).

programme.title: Chaos Rising
programme.desc: Allison and Lydia stumble on a clue to finding Boyd and Erica, while a childhood friend of Stiles goes missing. Meanwhile, Derek is surprised by the reappearance of someone from his past…someone he thought had died in the Hale house fire.

programme.title: Fireflies
programme.desc: With Boyd (Sinqua Walls) and Cora (Adelaide Kane) on the loose and under the influence of the full moon, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) find that they may have to turn to an unlikely ally for help…Chris Argent (JR Bourne).

programme.title: Unleashed
programme.desc: While Scott (Tyler Posey) tries to keep Isaac (Daniel Sharman) from engaging in a deadly confrontation with the Twins in school, Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) attempts to prove his theory that the killings have absolutely nothing to do with werewolves.

programme.title: Frayed
programme.desc: During a bus ride to a cross country meet, Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends flash back to the events of a preemptive strike against the Alphas that has left several injured and possibly one or more dead.

programme.title: Motel California
programme.desc: Stranded at a motel in Fairvale, California for the night because of a postponed meet, Scott (Tyler Posey) and the others suffer strange experiences that cause them to believe members of their own group may the mysterious killer's newest targets.

programme.title: Currents
programme.desc: As the danger begins to move closer to Scott (Tyler Posey) his trusted mentor and boss, Deaton (Seth Gilliam), is threatened. Meanwhile, Kali (Felisha Terrell) and the twins (Charlie Carver and Max Carver) go after Derek (Tyler Hoechlin).

programme.title: Visionary
programme.desc: Seeking answers, Scott (Tyler Posey). Allison (Crystal Reed) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) hear stories told by two unlikely narrators -- Peter (Ian Bohen) and Gerard (Michael Hogan) -- and discover a secret about the color of a werewolf's eyes.

programme.title: The Girl Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: As Allison (Crystal Reed) begins to suspect someone close to her may be involved in the murders, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) conclude that Lydia's (Holland Roden) rising talents may be their best bet to solving the murders.

programme.title: The Overlooked
programme.desc: Trapped inside an evacuated Beacon Hills hospital during a powerful storm, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) must defend themselves against the Alphas while trying to figure out how to save Cora's (Adelaide Kane) life.

programme.title: Bits Of Love
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic underground bunker, a virtual reality world begins to turn on its inventor (Jon Tenney) after he becomes romantically involved with -- and then spurns -- the holographic interface (Natasha Henstridge) that controls the system.

programme.title: Second Thoughts
programme.desc: A mentally challenged man (Howie Mandel) is made more intelligent by a machine that transfers people's memories and experiences into his head, but kills its victims. And he soon discovers that the mind can be a minefield in The Outer Limits.

programme.title: Re-Generation
programme.desc: After a couple's son dies, an experimental procedure harvests the boy's nerve cells, allowing the mother to give birth to a genetically identical child. But soon it becomes clear that this fetus is not just identical…it is actually Justin himself.

programme.title: Last Supper
programme.desc: A man's family is turned upside down when he discovers that his son's college sweetheart is the same woman he rescued from a secret military experiment twenty years before...only she has not aged a day since. Peter Onorati and Fred Savage star.

programme.title: Stream Of Consciousness
programme.desc: When "the Stream" -- an artificial system providing information to all society members through computer chips implanted in their brains -- begins to malfunction, an unlikely, "primitive" man (George Newbern) may be the mankind's only hope.

programme.title: Dark Rain
programme.desc: After a chemical war renders the world's population unable to conceive healthy children, a mother and father must escape from a sinister government agency intent on using their miraculously healthy newborn to repopulate the species.

programme.title: The Camp
programme.desc: In a society imprisoned for generations by extraterrestrial who invaded Earth, an electronics expert (Harley Jane Kozak) discovers that not only are her human jailers really machines, but they also have been holding prisoners for nearly a century.

programme.title: Heart's Desire
programme.desc: A preacher descends upon the 18th century town of Heart's Desire and offers to share his extraordinary powers with four outlaws. But who is this stranger and why has he given these outlaws such deadly powers? Caspar Van Dien and Esai Morales star.

programme.title: Sostengo el Pi
programme.desc: María de todos los Ángeles, ve atentamente un programa de televisión en el que el maestro de yoga da tres consejos básicos del feng shui para atraer la fortuna y el amor, esto provoca que María inmediatamente se ponga a mover muebles y a tirar cosas, al ver esto Carmelito pone el grito en el cielo, hasta que su nieta lo convence de que con esto sencillos cambios podrán atraer la fortuna y el dinero. Delfino y Betsabé llegan a casa de Doña Lucha a cobrar el dinero de una tanda que les debe de tiempo atrás, ésta que también ha visto el programa, y no tiene para pagarles, usa los argumentos de maestro Chuy y los convence de que se inscriban en un curso de feng shui que va a impartir, con lo cual aprovecha para ponerlos a mover los muebles de su casa, hasta que ya cansados deciden abandonar el curso. Como segundo paso Doña Lucha decide escombrar la casa y comienza a tirar cosas de Rosa Aurora, Albertano y del Chino, pero el mono de coco que ella trajo de Acapulco lo vuelve a colocar en el mismo lugar. La euforia por limpiar lleva a las dos familias hasta la azotea en la que se desata un conflicto por el espacio y por el respeto a sus pertenencias.

programme.title: Foto familiar
programme.desc: El abuelo de Benito llega al edificio para tomarse la foto familiar. Germán encuentra a un equipo de niños con quien hacer la reta de fútbol.

programme.title: Abarrotes Don Arturo
programme.desc: Morris tiene la tarea de vender unos chocolates de la escuela y a su familia se les ocurre una idea. Lorena manda a arreglar la máquina de escribir de Frankie.

programme.title: Tapa calefactora
programme.desc: Germán intentará instalar una nueva tapa calefactora en el inodoro de don Hipólito. Mientras que, Vanessa probará un remedio contra las canas.

programme.title: Regalo perfecto
programme.desc: Luisito le da un regalo a Silvita por su cumpleanos, pero ella no lo esperaba. En tanto que, Calaco decide visitar a Rocco en su casa.

programme.title: Tendedero
programme.desc: Magdalena decides to put a clothesline in the middle of the corridors of the building and Luis will look for a way to remove it.

programme.title: Amigos
programme.desc: Silvia agrega a Luis al chat de la guardería y Germán recibe la visita de sus amigos comentaristas de TUDN que transmiten un partido desde la conserjería.

programme.title: Auto nuevo
programme.desc: Luis le compra un auto nuevo a Silvia para que pasee con Luisito Jr. y Morris le tiene una mala noticia a sus padres: no le gusta el rock.

programme.title: Tacos veganos
programme.desc: Virginia y Borre terminan su relacion y no conforme, ella decide iniciar su propio negocio de tacos veganos. Arturo se encuentra un billete de mil pesos.

programme.title: Ropa de paca
programme.desc: Jorjáis decide invertir en un negocio de ropa de paca y descubre que no está solo, tiene competencia. Silvia y Luis buscan sobrevivir al primer día de guardería de Luisito Jr.

programme.title: Silvia party loving
programme.desc: Karla, la sobrina de Silvia, la visita en su casa, y ella finge que tiene una actitud muy cool y se va de parranda con ella. Pedro se siente mal y no puede salir de su cuarto.

programme.title: Nano por un día
programme.desc: La guardería está cerrada y Silvia y Luis no tienen quién cuide a Luisito Jr., por lo que tendrán que elegir entre los vecinos. Hipólito, Pedro y Germán buscan hacer válida la garantía de un celular.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: El grupo de whats
programme.desc: Germán convoca a una junta vecinal, pero nadie asiste porque nadie vio el anuncio en el pizarrón, Jorjais les propone hacer un grupo de chat para enterarse de los acontecimientos en el edificio.

programme.title: El gas
programme.desc: Como es costumbre en el edificio, los vecinos no pagan la cuota del gas, y ante la negativa de todos, Luis decide poner su propio tanque estacionario ¡en la azotea!

programme.title: Franeleros
programme.desc: Luis estaciona su carro afuera de su edificio y un franelero quiere cobrarle 20 pesos por cuidar su coche. Los vecinos hacen una junta para planear quitarlos sin que haya consecuencias.

programme.title: El reciclaje
programme.desc: Los vecinos reciben una invitación de la delegación para separar la basura. Algo muy básico: orgánica e inorgánica, Germán es el encargado de dicha misión.

programme.title: La fiesta de Morris
programme.desc: Magdalena abre una cuenta en Facebook donde presume demasiadas cosas e inclusive transmite en vivo una invitación pública para la fiesta de su nieto Morris.

programme.title: La chica del feis
programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima; Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.
